name: Indoor Golf Valley (DBA) M&M shops LLC
address: M&M shops LLC, 233 Pagosa Way, Fremont, CA 94539
about: Indoor Golf Valley is an indoor golf facility that offers simulator-based golf experiences. The venue provides a space for golfers to play virtual rounds of golf and practice their skills in an indoor setting. With a focus on technology and convenience, the venue caters to golfers looking for an accessible way to enjoy the sport without weather constraints. The facility is designed for individuals and groups seeking a modern golf experience with various amenities available.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for realistic gameplay
Convenient indoor location unaffected by weather
Available food and drink options for a complete experience
Suitable for both practice and social events

food_and_drink.notes: Bar service available with various drink options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, but you are welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase at the venue's bar and kitchen.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator settings and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Indoor Golf Valley welcomes families and offers a kid-friendly atmosphere with appropriate amenities.
